pilotRole: Prove irregular salvaged silhouettes and visible repair seams can stay coherent and uncluttered.

identity.biome: Salvaged timber, patched sails, reused hulls, warm resin lamps, and visible joinery

restorationChange: Repairs remain visible but rise higher; patched sails become banners and the breakwater opens into a working gate.

landmarks.visual: A warm cradle built inside the ribs of a salvaged boat hull.
Public joinery platform with planks, clamps, tools, and proudly visible seams.
Patched sails and useful remnants transformed into bright functional stalls.
Carved boards and story planks held in an open timber hall.

boss.name: Garran
boss.visual: Massive driftwood harbor guardian bound with brass clamps, rope, and old name planks.

arena.name: Garran's Breakwater
arena.visual: Layered driftwood sea wall whose central repaired section can open as a gate.

avoid: random broken debris in tile corridor
